creator: lippe@freebsdbrasil.com.br
text:
In http://www.freebsd.org/commercial/software_bycat.html, I found much links broken, and others that they need to be brought up to date.

- Databases

Status: [DOESN'T EXISTS MORE]
Reference: Altera SQL Server
URL: http://www.altera.gr/

Status: [BROKEN]
Reference: Empress Software 
Reference 2:Empress Software Inc.
URL: http://www.empress.com/

- Development Tools

Status: [404 NOT FOUND]
Reference: Another Programmer's Editor (APE)
URL: http://my.execpc.com/~acadix/

Status: [DOMAIN FOR SALE]
Reference: CobolScript
URL: http://www.cobolscript.com/

Status: [UPDATE]
Reference: X-Designer
URL: http://www.ist-inc.com/xd/
Desc: Link pointed for http://www.freebsd.org/commercial/%22http://www.ist-inc.com/xd/,  and this page doesn't exists.

- Miscellaneous

Status: [DOESN'T EXISTS MORE]
Reference: VirtuFlex Software
URL: http://www.virtuflex.com/

- Multimedia

Status: [DOESN'T EXISTS MORE]
Reference: Metro Link
URL: http://www.metrolink.com/

- Network Systems and Applications

URL: http://www.differential.com/

Reference: IP23 GmbH
URL: http://www.ip23.net/

URL: http://www.shpink.com/

URL: http://www.tri-polar.com/

- Scientific and Language Tools

URL: http://www.mathtools.net/

- System Administration / ISP

Status: [BROKEN]
Reference: Covalent Technologies
URL: http://raven.covalent.net/

Status: [BROKEN]
Reference: Firehunter
URL: http://www.firehunter.com/

Status: [BROKEN]
Reference: Network Security Wizard
URL: http://www.securitywizards.com/

Status: [DOESN'T EXISTS MORE]
Reference: Quantified Systems, Inc.
URL: www.urchin.com pointer for http://www.google.com/analytics/

Fix: 

Remove and update these links in this page.
